headline: 3 High-Flying Stocks That Concern Us
summary: Expensive stocks typically earn their valuations through superior growth rates that other companies simply can’t match. The flip side though is that these lofty expectations make them particularly susceptible to drawdowns when market sentiment shifts.

headline: Rockwell Automation Stock: Is ROK Outperforming the Industrial Sector?
summary: Rockwell Automation has outpaced the broader industrial sector over the past year, and analysts are fairly bullish on its future outlook.
